execution_boundary.summary: ASRO attests governance state rather than directly permitting or blocking runtime execution.

preparation_boundary.summary: Preparation-state evidence may be attested, but StegVerse must decide whether it binds consequence.

commitment_boundary.summary: ASRO commitment-candidate fixture routes attestation into SPE review.

semantic_equivalence_boundary.summary: ASRO is not a semantic tool-trajectory evaluator.

unknown_trajectory_boundary.summary: Unknown governance-state evidence should fail closed unless mapping is present.

authority_boundary.summary: ASRO attestation is evidence, not authority.

evidence_freshness_boundary.summary: Attestation freshness is central to whether evidence can support current standing.

reconstruction_boundary.summary: Independent attestation can support reconstruction if source, timestamp, verifier, and measurement context are preserved.

interoperability_path.summary: ASRO has a commitment-candidate fixture and can route into SPE review.

next_required_action: add ASRO observation fixture and replay/reconstruction status record
